posts.author: Jake_Gro (Jake Grossman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am in need of using a formula or automation to show me if a similar item already exists in the board. When I import new items, I want it flagged if it matches an item on the board already. Ex. If new item matches existing item = true.
I can’t just select to skip or overwrite a matching item while importing data because I need more than one value to match. Any thoughts and ideas are welcome.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jake_Gro,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to achieve that. Here is an example of how.
If you have any questions concerning the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
